title: Implement repository status observer
goal: Implement the repository status observer described in docs/plans/bureau-runtime-automation-baseline-v1.md as source-attributed evidence for Bureau runs.

metadata.safety_boundary: observation only; source systems keep authority

acceptance.assertion: Implementation follows the observer binding and failure semantics in the registered plan.
Observed repository facts retain source, timestamp and confidence information.
Ambiguous observations remain visible and do not become successful completion.
Tests cover explicit match, fallback match, no match and ambiguity cases.
